mapper.sql: bd.id, bd.code, bd.name, bd.level, bd.seq, bd.parent_id
bd.code as department_code, bd.name as department_name

bd.id, bd.created_time, bd.created_by, bd.created_id, bd.modified_time, bd.modified_by, bd.modified_id, bd.deleted, bd.version, bd.remark, bd.status, bd.code, bd.name, bd.level, bd.seq, bd.build_in_flag, bd.parent_id, bd.org_id
mapper.select:
select
, 0 as checked from `department` bd inner join `org` bo on bd.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bd.deleted = 0
and bd.status = #{status}
and bo.id = #{orgId} order by bd.name asc, bd.seq asc

select
from `department` bd inner join `org` bo on bd.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join `user_department` bud on bd.id = bud.department_id and bud.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bud.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bd.deleted = 0 and bd.status = 1 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bud.user_id = #{userId} order by bud.primary_flag desc, bd.name asc, bd.seq asc
